revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Fukamisono Shrine
| native_name = 深溝神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Fukamisono Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Fukamisono Shrine'''|深溝神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|大和国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}
** Series ordinal: 71
** P155: {{ill|Q135038955|ltq=Q135038955|qid=Q135038955|1=Katsuragimiagatano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q43594611|ltq=Q43594611|qid=Q43594611|1=Hobata Shrine}}

* {{ill|Yamato Province|lt=Yamato Province|be|Ямата (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Yamato|ckb|پارێزگای یەماتۆ|cs|Provincie Jamato|de|Provinz Yamato|el|Επαρχία Γιαμάτο|en|Yamato Province|es|Provincia de Yamato|fa|ولایت یاماتو|fi|Yamaton provinssi|fr|Province de Yamato|gl|Provincia de Yamato|hak|Yamato-koet|id|Provinsi Yamato|it|Yamato (provincia)|ja|大和国|ko|야마토국|lt|Jamato žemė|nl|Yamato (provincie)|no|Yamato (provins)|pt|Província de Yamato|ro|Provincia Yamato|ru|Ямато (провинция)|simple|Yamato Province|sk|Jamato (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамато|th|แคว้นยามาโตะ|tr|Yamato (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямато|ur|یاماتو صوبہ|zh_min_nan|Yamato-kok|zh_yue|大和國|zh|大和國|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}}
